name: Airmeet Virtual Events API
what_it_does: Virtual event and community platform with REST API — providing interactive webinars, conferences, and networking events with social lounge networking, sponsor booths, and engagement analytics, with API for attendee management and event data integration.
use_cases: Creating and managing virtual events programmatically via API
Importing attendee registration data from CRM into Airmeet event
Querying event engagement analytics and attendance data post-event
Syncing Airmeet event data with marketing automation systems
Managing speaker profiles and session schedules via API
not_for: Large in-person conference management (use Cvent or Whova)
Simple video conferencing without event management (use Zoom or Teams)
On-demand video content library (use Wistia or Vimeo)
best_when: A company hosting virtual conferences, webinars, or community events wants interactive networking features with API integration for CRM and marketing automation.
avoid_when: You need in-person event management, simple video calls, or purely on-demand content without live event features.

auth.notes: API key from Airmeet organization settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for event lifecycle events. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 100 attendees, basic events
pricing.paid_tiers: Premium from $167/month; Business from $417/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Free tier for small events. Bangalore-based Indian company. Backed by Sequoia Capital India. Strong virtual networking features (social lounge, speed networking). Used by 400,000+ event organizers. API on Business+ plans.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for events, sessions, attendees, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Webhook for event events. Documentation available in developer portal. API on Business+ plans only. Indian company — US data residency available but check for data sovereignty requirements.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Attendee registration idempotent by email. Event creation idempotent by reference. Session management idempotent. Engagement data reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires Business plan or higher
Indian company — data may reside in India by default; verify residency
Virtual networking features (social lounge) cannot be configured via API
Live event data has higher latency than pre/post-event queries

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US and IN data residency. Bearer token auth. No scope granularity. Standard SaaS security for event platform. Indian company with growing enterprise compliance focus.
